Class SAAJDocument

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.saaj.ProxyNode<Document, OMDocument>
org.apache.axis2.saaj.SAAJDocument
All Implemented Interfaces:
Document, Node
public final class SAAJDocument extends ProxyNode<Document, OMDocument> implements Document
